response.justification: Strong senior engineer with excellent craftsmanship and recent GenAI infrastructure exposure through MCP work, but the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions is not demonstrated on the resume. Recent pivot to AI (April 2025) shows promise but cannot verify required depth. Missing explicit Python, vector databases, and RAG experience—all critical for this role.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with proven mentoring and technical leadership across multiple companies and domains
TypeScript/Node.js expertise with current work on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure frameworks at re:cinq
Strong cloud platform experience (AWS CDK, Docker) and engineering culture foundation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Only 1-2 months of demonstrated AI/GenAI infrastructure work; 8+ years of production AI solutions not evidenced in resume
Python not mentioned despite being standard for AI development; no experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or data pipelines shown
No evidence of LLM performance metrics, optimization techniques, or multi-agent system framework experience (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)

key_factors.factor: Tech stack gaps (Python, vector DBs, RAG)
